channel.title: MYB
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: GoFundMe CEO on Why Crowdfunding Sparks Generosity and Judgment
item.description: GoFundMEeCEO Tim Cadogan speaks on the generosity and judgment that comes from health-related crowdfunding campaigns

item.title: ‘God Of War: Sons Of Sparta’ Feels Like A Lost Super Nintendo Game
item.description: Sony's new 2D adventure is solidly good but not great.

item.title: Phil Spencer Retires From Xbox As Microsoft AI Exec Takes Over
item.description: There is an earthquake unfolding in Microsoft’s gaming division as we speak, with a complete restructuring at the top of Xbox. What we know so far:

item.title: 7 Ways To Protect Your Dog Or Cat’s Dental Health
item.description: A board-certified veterinary dentist shares ways we can protect the dental health of our cats and dogs during February’s Pet Dental Health Month and b...

item.title: What To Watch This Weekend: New Shows And Movies To Stream On Netflix, Hulu, Prime Video, Apple TV And More
item.description: Looking for something new to stream this weekend? Here’s every major new movie and show hitting Netflix, Hulu, Prime Video, Apple TV and more.

item.title: “Hide competitive stats”
item.description: I’ve been playing an online wordgame for a few months, and after each round, it shows me how well I’m doing against the 10,000 other people who are al...

item.title: Freelancer empathy
item.description: When phone cameras got good enough, portrait photographers scolded people who took their own headshots. And when the Mac got pretty good at typesettin...

item.title: How to write a coaching/learning prompt
item.description: An AI like Claude is actually a pretty good fortune cookie. You can ask a simple question and get a simple answer, sometimes a profound one. But this ...

item.title: Misguided optimization
item.description: Industrialism brought us the idea of optimization. Incremental improvements combined with measurement to gradually improve results. We can optimize fo...

item.title: Mysterious predictability
item.description: A watched pot will boil. As it heats up, there’s no way to predict where the cavitation will start and which bubble will arrive first. But with enough...
